column1: Age decides which screening pathway runs, and it is collected as date_of_birth, never a defaulted number. Under-18s do not receive the adult screen. 16 to 17 year olds follow a young-person pathway with guardian consent and conservative training defaults. Under-16 is out of scope for launch and blocked. This routing runs before the screening questions.

column3: Standard adult pre-exercise screening (7 questions). Route per Screening Outcomes.

Use the young-person screening pathway (ESSA-style youth screen), not the adult flow. Require guardian consent before any program generates. Conservative defaults: block Advanced and Power classes, rir_min +1, load increments at the bottom of the range.
column5: A minor is never silently defaulted into the adult flow.

column3: Do not generate a program. The platform is not designed or screened for under-16s. Show a message explaining this.
column5: Hard stop. Out of scope for launch.

column2: Age not provided or not verified
column3: Do not generate. Prompt for date of birth. Age is never defaulted for screening purposes.
